sections.paragraph:
unused in Kal. [“But apparently signifying to lap, like the cognate words, لَسَّ, لسب, لسم compare לָחַשׁ. حس.”]

Poel לֹושֵׁן denom. from לָשֹׁון pr. to make tongue, to tongue, i.e. to use the tongue boldly (comp. Germ. Beine machen, used of any one running swiftly, fleeing); to slander (see לָשֹׁון used of the tongue of a slanderer). Part. with suff. מְלֹושְׁנִי, מְלָֽשְׁנִי קרי, for מְלַשְׁנִי, מְלַשְׁנִי, part. Piel, Psa 101:5. (Arab. لَسَنَ to slander.)

Hiphil, id. Pro 30:10.
